title: Practice Admin Step Group Create Scaffold
goal: Add a minimal /practice/admin scaffold that lists and creates practice_step_groups for the selected menu so step-level browse/admin authoring can start before node-link, tacit, and media slices.
constraints: Keep menuView.ts, sessionView.ts, adminView.ts, runtime.ts, practiceStore.ts, types/practice.ts, router, and sim flows unchanged unless a concrete blocker is proven from code.
Add the step-group write helper only in src/lib/practice/queries.ts; no page-level direct Supabase calls.
Limit this slice to step-group list/create only; allow primary_location_id to be null.
Defer step_group_nodes link/edit, node edit/delete, multi-hop path editing, and tacit/media authoring.

Use the fresh 2026-04-19 session dirty baseline for extra_changes, and treat task-related docs/worker/LAST_SESSION.md, docs/worker/LEARNINGS.md, and docs/worker/MISTAKES.md as allowed auxiliary files.
acceptance: Selected menu on /practice/admin shows existing step groups through the current bundle read path with a clear empty state.
Admins can create a step group with display_step_no, title, optional summary, and optional primary_location_id for the selected menu.
When the selected menu has zero locations, step-group create still succeeds with null primary_location_id.
After successful create, the admin summary stays in sync and the new group appears in /practice/admin as well as the existing /practice/menu/:menuId step overview in display_step_no order.
runtime/store/session boundaries and sim flows remain behaviorally unchanged.
Phase 4 completes in the required order build -> lint -> self-reviewer -> tsc, allowing only the documented pre-existing useGameTick lint warning and pre-existing Vite chunk-size warning.
